description_long: This is a compact, rectangular filing cabinet constructed from a wood-textured material with a rich brown finish. The front features a single drawer at the top, equipped with a metallic bar handle, and an open shelf space below for additional storage. The sides and back are plain, with the wood grain pattern continuing seamlessly around the cabinet. The top surface is flat and sturdy, suitable for placing small office items or decor. The drawer appears to lack a visible lock or label holder, emphasizing a minimalist design. This cabinet is likely intended for use in offices or home workspaces, providing both enclosed and open storage options.
description: A small, brown wood-textured filing cabinet with a single drawer and open shelf, featuring a metallic bar handle and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the drawer with a metallic handle and an open shelf below.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain wood-textured surface with no visible features.
description_view_2: Back view showing a continuous wood grain surface with no openings or hardware.
description_view_3: Right side view, identical to the left, with a plain wood-textured surface.
